category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates CycloneDX SBOMs from Python projects; official GitHub README says CycloneDX Python generates SBOM documents for Python projects and environments.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is CycloneDX Python SBOM Generation Tool; source_facts.name is cyclonedx-python.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says to read the full documentation and includes CLI usage; Read the Docs project is linked from the official project documentation configuration; CycloneDX hosts specification docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository is CycloneDX/cyclonedx-python and describes itself as the CycloneDX SBOM generator for Python projects and environments.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable cyclonedx-py; official GitHub README lists Python environment, Poetry, Pipenv, requirements, BOM, SBOM, and CycloneDX topics.
